scripts.check: npm run validate:protocol && npm run validate:mock && npm run validate:reference-client && npm --workspace sdks/typescript run check && npm --workspace @ascp/host-service run check && npm --workspace @ascp/app-host-console run build
scripts.validate:protocol: bash tooling/scripts/validate_method_contracts.sh && bash tooling/scripts/validate_event_contracts.sh && bash tooling/scripts/validate_replay_semantics.sh && bash tooling/scripts/validate_auth_semantics.sh && bash tooling/scripts/validate_extension_semantics.sh && bash tooling/scripts/validate_conformance.sh
